candidates.why: Explicit COGS-related D&A line, but it appears to be a component of the selected parent row 'Cost of Operating Revenue' because together with 'Depreciation in Cost of Revenues' and 'Material Expenses' it sums to the selected COGS amount. Adding it separately would double count.

Explicit COGS-related D&A line, but it appears to be a component of the selected parent row 'Cost of Operating Revenue' because together with 'Amortization in Cost of Revenues' and 'Material Expenses' it sums to the selected COGS amount. Adding it separately would double count.

variables.notes: Selected COGS row 'Cost of Operating Revenue' appears to already include both COGS amortization and depreciation.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A-related amortization line, but it appears embedded in the selected SG&A bucket because it sits as a component under SG&A and, with labor expense, sums to the SG&A total shown. Therefore it should not be added separately.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket already excludes R&D per prior mapping, and the visible SG&A amortization line appears to be a sub-component of SG&A rather than a separate same-level add-back row.
